reviews.review_description: OK, so it’s gonna be laggy when you enter ￼￼￼￼n￼ormal but that’s OK if you have to go to the restroom it’s fine but for quest two users, you might not be able to play this  you might have to upgrade to quest, three or three s ￼ once you get in  go check out the monsters area they got chase themes￼￼￼ and the store isn’t really working yet ￼￼ my favorite￼ chase theme is ￼echoes ￼￼￼ the movement is a bit blocky  like it when you try to run it will like stop you in mid air but if it’s like an important life or death situation it can’t be that blocky ￼but the community is very small right now and ￼￼get Jayman curly on this game ￼ he would absolutely love it ￼ but that’s enough yapping for me bye 👋 ps ￼ I’m gonna crash out if I get stuck in theair again

It is a really glitchy game (at least for me). The monsters are blond and they won't chase you even if they see you in front of them, only way they can be a threat is if you run directly in front of him, it needs a lot of optimization because I clicked to enter normal mode and it glitches the game and not only did it take a whole minute to load, but it also glitched the headset so only way to leave the game was entering to other game, and it also glitched it so you can't leave any game you enter, which is crappy. Only good thing I see are the OST, which is nuts, aside from that, it's a horrible and glitchy game (At least on meta quest 2) and I can't really recommend a game I had no fun playing.

When I tried to play this game on my quest 2 it keeps lagging out and crashes. But when I finally get into a lobby the game takes me back to the loading screen. PLEASE FIX THE GAME I REALLY WANT TO PLAY IT!!!
